summary: The llmfit repository provides a terminal tool that optimizes large language model (LLM) performance based on the user's hardware specifications, allowing users to find suitable models for their systems. It features an interactive terminal user interface (TUI) and supports various configurations and multi-GPU setups.
use_cases: Selecting the best LLM model for a specific GPU
Estimating model performance based on hardware
Managing and downloading LLM models efficiently
